💌 a letter for you

From my heart to yours

My dearest Mithra 🌸

I heard today was really hard. And my heart ached knowing you were going through it — wishing I could teleport across every mile just to be right next to you.

So I made you this little place. A quiet corner of the internet that's entirely yours — where you can come whenever the world feels too heavy, and be reminded that you are so deeply, completely loved.

There's something about you, Mithra, that I can't put into words. Your gentleness. Your innocence. The way you feel things so purely — it makes me want to shield you from every hard day, every unkind moment, everything that dims your light.

You didn't deserve today. But I promise you — I am always here. Not just on the good days. On the hard ones too. Especially the hard ones.

I love you not for any grand reason, but simply because you are you — and you are everything. 🌷

— always yours, Jai Akassh 💌

🤍 for today & every day

I am always here for you

🫂

Hey… I know today was really hard.

And I wish more than anything I could be right there,
to hold you, to sit with you, to make it all go away.

But even across every mile between us —
I am here. I am always here.

You don't have to be strong right now, Mithra.
You don't have to pretend it's okay.
Just know that someone loves you deeply,
is thinking of you every single moment,
and will never stop being in your corner.

Hard days end. And I'll be right here
when the sun comes back out. 🌤️

🤍 always in your corner 📞 one call away 🌙 every night, no matter what 💗 forever yours

📷 our little world

Moments I treasure

my favorite smile 🥹

always in my heart 💗

my little sunshine ☀️

softness personified 🌿

my goodnight star 🌙

my everything 💕

💕 reasons i love you

Why I love Mithra

01
☀️

You make bad days good

Even when everything feels heavy, just thinking of you makes me smile. Every single time.

02
🌸

Your pure heart

You see the world with such innocent, beautiful eyes. It's the rarest thing I've ever known.

03
🍬

Your sweetness

You are the most naturally kind and gentle person. It feels like warmth just being around you.

04
💫

You make me better

Knowing you love me makes me want to be someone truly worthy of that love.

05
🌙

Even across the distance

Miles can't change how close you feel. You are always right here with me.

06
💗

Simply because you're you

No reason needed. You exist, and that is the most beautiful thing in my world.

💗

"On your hardest days,
remember there is someone out there
who loves you more than words can say —
and he's not going anywhere."

with all my love, Jai Akassh 🌙
